examples: The hikers got into a storm and had to turn back

meanings.definition: go back to a previous state
examples: We reverted to the old rules

meanings.definition: force to go away; used both with concrete and metaphoric meanings
examples: The supermarket had to turn back many disappointed customers

meanings.definition: hold back, as of a danger or an enemy; check the expansion or influence of
examples: Check the growth of communism in South East Asia
Turn back the tide of communism

meanings.definition: turn inside out or upside down
